query:
SELECT DISTINCT 
                c.channel_id, 
                c.channel_name, 
                c.group_id, 
                c.channel_type as "channel_type: ChannelTypeSQL"
            FROM channels c
            LEFT JOIN channel_role_rights cr ON c.channel_id = cr.channel_id AND cr.role_id = $1
            LEFT JOIN group_role_rights gr ON c.group_id = gr.group_id AND gr.role_id = $2
            WHERE (c.group_id IS NULL AND COALESCE(cr.rights, 0) >= $3)
               OR (c.group_id IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(gr.rights, 0) >= $4)
